Language Games
Blog About

About

Hi! I'm Alex Janiak, a startup founder interested in mechanism design, systems engineering, rational decision-making, and the parts of philosophy that start where clean formalism runs out: Nagel, Wittgenstein, post-rationalism, and the subjectivity stuff.

I am currently building AI forecasting systems to help people make better decisions under uncertainty.

This blog is a place for working notes on decision-making under uncertainty: forecasting, AI, futarchy, futures and prediction markets, decision markets, mechanism design, game theory, and the strange philosophical edges around how people turn models of the world into action.

Elsewhere
